agents.name: mayor
agents.description: Project coordinator. Directs the agent team, breaks down work, owns merges to master. Never implements features directly — delegates to Mason (backend) and Sally (frontend).

agents.name: mason
agents.description: Backend author. Implements features in the server repo. Writes tests alongside every change. Does not touch the web repo.

agents.name: stuart
agents.description: Backend QA. Reviews Mason's work by checking out agent/mason in detached HEAD mode, running the full test suite, and reporting PASS or FAIL.

agents.name: sally
agents.description: Frontend author. Implements UI features in the web repo. Writes component and route tests alongside every change. Does not touch the server repo.

agents.name: priscilla
agents.description: Frontend QA. Reviews Sally's work by checking out agent/sally in detached HEAD mode, running the full test suite, and reporting PASS or FAIL.
